title: Labor Market Outcomes of Restatements for Corporate Accountants
abstract: Our study examines the impact of nonfraud financial restatements on the careers of corporate accountants. Using LinkedIn data, we identify a sample of accountants working at 201 firms that restated their financial statements between 2004 and 2014. We find that compared with human resource employees within the same company or corporate accountants in matched control firms, accountants in restatement firms, particularly senior staff, have a higher rate of departure and a lower probability of moving to a higher-ranked position outside the company after a restatement is announced. Using a longer job search period as a measure of being forced to leave, we find that the higher departure rate for senior accountants is because of being forced out rather than leaving voluntarily. The higher departure rates occur only for accountants working at firms with more severe restatements. In a separate sample of firms that restate financial statements because of clerical errors, we do not find higher departure rates for accountants after the restatement is revealed. Our results suggest that senior accountants in restatement firms experience negative outcomes in the labor market. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Funding: J. (X.) Jiang acknowledges research support from the Eli Broad College of Business. M. Shen acknowledges financial support from the NUS Start-up Grant [Grant A-0003914-00-00] and the Singapore MOE Tier-1 Grant [Grant A-8000098-00-00]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.00430 .
title_cn: 企业会计人员财务重述的劳动市场结果
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了非欺诈性财务重述对企业会计师职业生涯的影响。通过使用LinkedIn数据，我们识别出2004年至2014年间对财务报表进行了重述的201家公司的会计师样本。我们发现，与同一公司的人力资源员工或匹配对照公司中的企业会计师相比，重述公司的会计师，尤其是高级员工，在重述公告后离职率更高，且转向公司外部更高职位的概率更低。以较长的求职时间作为被迫离职的衡量标准，我们发现高级会计师的高离职率是由于被迫离开，而非自愿离职。只有在重述更为严重的公司中，高离职率才会出现。在一个单独的样本中，我们考察了因文书错误而重述财务报表的公司，结果发现重述公布后会计师的离职率并没有明显增加。我们的结果表明，重述公司的高级会计师在劳动力市场上面临负面后果。本文已被会计学的Suraj Srinivasan接受。资助：J. (X.) Jiang感谢Eli Broad商学院的研究支持。M. Shen感谢新加坡国立大学启动资金[资助编号A-0003914-00-00]和新加坡教育部Tier-1资助[资助编号A-8000098-00-00]的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.00430获取。

title: Dual Sourcing Made Easy: Distributionally Robust Optimization of Inventory Systems Under Independent Demand
abstract: A Distribution-Free Playbook for Dual Sourcing In the paper “Dual Sourcing Made Easy: Distributionally Robust Optimization of an Inventory System Under Independent Demand,” the authors study a common dual-sourcing dilemma: a low-cost supplier with a long lead time versus a faster, more expensive backup. Rather than committing to a parametric demand model, they propose a distributionally robust formulation that relies only on the demand mean and variance, while leveraging independence across periods. This yields a simple, closed-form way to set a tailored base–surge (TBS) policy: regular orders cover the predictable component of demand, and emergency orders buffer the remaining uncertainty, with inventory targets reflecting lead-time differences. The resulting policy is lightweight to calibrate, easy to deploy, and straightforward to stress test. In a field application using data from a multinational food manufacturer, the robust TBS settings improve service performance and reduce stockouts relative to the firm’s current rule and standard benchmarks, without sacrificing cost efficiency under volatility.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 简单化的双重采购：在独立需求下的库存系统的分布鲁棒优化
abstract_cn:
一种无分布假设的双重采购策略

在论文《简化双重采购：独立需求下库存系统的分布鲁棒优化》中，作者研究了一个常见的双重采购困境：一个低成本但交货时间长的供应商与一个更快但成本更高的备份供应商。作者提出了一种分布鲁棒的模型，而不是依赖于参数化的需求模型，该模型仅依赖于需求的均值和方差，同时利用了各个时间段之间的独立性。这种方法提供了一种简单的封闭形式来设定定制的基础-激增（TBS）政策：常规订单覆盖可预测的需求部分，而紧急订单则缓冲剩余的不确定性，库存目标反映了交货时间的差异。所得到的政策在校准上轻便，部署简单，并且易于进行压力测试。在一项使用跨国食品制造商数据的实地应用中，鲁棒的TBS设置相较于该公司的当前规则和标准基准，提高了服务绩效并减少了缺货情况，同时在波动性下不牺牲成本效率。

title: From armed roots to airline routes in South America: A dual imprinting perspective
abstract: Abstract Reserch Summary We propose that founding partner relationships can leave distinct imprints on organizations that differ in durability and in how they respond to subsequent changes involving the founding partner. Examining South American airlines founded between 1919 and 1984, we argue and find that such relationships simultaneously create an internal capability imprint, enhancing operational performance and facilitating international expansion, and an external identity imprint, constraining expansion by triggering national security concerns among foreign regulators. Internal capabilities persist longer because they are embedded in organizational structures and tacit knowledge, while external identity resides in more malleable stakeholder perceptions. Post‐founding changes to the imprinter reshape these effects asymmetrically: the transition to civilian air traffic control erodes the competitive advantage of military‐derived capabilities by diffusing previously scarce expertise, while military coups intensify the negative consequences of a military‐associated identity. These findings advance a dual imprinting perspective and contribute to strategy research by explaining persistent organizational heterogeneity through founding‐era capabilities and identities. Managerial Summary When launching a venture, founders instinctively seek to collaborate with powerful partners such as celebrated investors and high‐profile board members. Those relationships leave two distinct legacies. The first is operational: the knowledge and systems a powerful partner brings embed themselves deeply, sharpening capabilities that sustain competitive advantage for years. The second is reputational: the outside world immediately begins to categorize your organization through that association, and that categorization can be hard to escape. Our research on South American airlines shows how military‐era founding partners produced operational excellence that fueled international growth, while simultaneously creating a security‐sensitive identity that blocked market access in politically sensitive contexts. The lesson for founders: think several moves ahead. The question is not solely what this partner can give us today, but how will we be seen if his or her reputation shifts tomorrow.
title_cn: 从武装根源到南美航空航线：一种双重印记视角
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究总结 我们提出创始合伙人关系可以在组织中留下不同的印记，这些印记在持续性和对随后的变化的响应方式上有所不同。通过考察1919年至1984年间成立的南美航空公司，我们论证并发现，这种关系同时创造了内部能力印记，增强了运营绩效并促进了国际扩张，以及外部身份印记，因触发外国监管者的国家安全担忧而限制扩张。内部能力的持续性更强，因为它们嵌入在组织结构和默会知识中，而外部身份则存在于更易变的利益相关者认知中。创始后对印记的变更不对称地重塑这些影响：向民用空中交通管制的过渡通过传播以往稀缺的专业知识，侵蚀了军事衍生能力的竞争优势，而军事政变则加剧了与军事相关身份的负面后果。这些发现推动了双重印记视角的发展，并通过创始时代的能力和身份解释了组织持久的异质性，促进了战略研究。

管理总结 在创业时，创始人本能地寻求与强大合作伙伴（如知名投资者和高知名度董事会成员）合作。这些关系留下了两种不同的遗产。第一种是运营层面的：强大合作伙伴所带来的知识和系统深深扎根，从而提升维持竞争优势的能力。第二种是声誉层面的：外部世界立即开始通过这一关联对您的组织进行分类，而这种分类往往难以逃避。我们对南美航空公司的研究表明，军事时代的创始合伙人产生了促进国际增长的运营卓越，同时创造了一个对安全敏感的身份，在政治敏感的情况下阻碍了市场准入。给创始人的教训是：要提前考虑几步棋。关键不只是这个伙伴今天能给我们什么，还是如果他或她的声誉明天发生变化，我们将如何被看待。

title: Where Sentence Is Served: Entrepreneurship and Socioeconomic Mobility Among Ex-Offenders
abstract: Entrepreneurship is often promoted as a pathway to upward mobility, especially for those who face barriers in traditional labor markets. However, whether and when entrepreneurship truly improves the long-term prospects of individuals with criminal records remains poorly understood. This study examines how the type of sentences—community service versus short incarceration—shapes ex-offenders’ employment routes and socioeconomic outcomes. Using three decades of Danish registry data, we compare individuals convicted of similar offenses but given different sentences and follow their trajectories over time. We find that incarceration substantially increases the likelihood that ex-offenders enter entrepreneurship as an alternative to wage work. However, this career path proves costly: compared with those who secure regular employment, individuals who pursue entrepreneurship after release earn persistently lower income and are more likely to reoffend. Mechanism analyses show that transitions into entrepreneurship concentrate among groups facing the steepest hiring barriers—foreign-born individuals, those without vocational training, residents of high-unemployment areas, and offenders convicted of property crimes or serving longer sentences—suggesting that entrepreneurship often reflects “push” rather than “pull” dynamics. Relative to unemployment, entrepreneurship is associated with modestly lower recidivism but similar income penalties. Our findings add nuance to the narrative of entrepreneurship as an emancipatory route for marginalized populations. They highlight the risks of relying on entrepreneurship as a re-integration strategy and underscore the need for organizational and policy interventions that expand access to stable jobs and provide targeted support for people with criminal records. Funding: Financial support from the Carlsberg Foundation (Carlsbergfondet) [Grant CF21-0156] is gratefully acknowledged. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19965 .
title_cn: 句子何处被呈现：创业与前刑事犯罪者的社会经济流动性
abstract_cn: 创业通常被视为向上流动的途径，尤其是对于那些在传统劳动市场中面临障碍的人。然而，创业是否以及何时真正改善有犯罪记录的个体的长期前景仍然不够清楚。本研究考察了不同类型的刑罚——社区服务与短期监禁——如何影响前罪犯的就业路径和社会经济结果。通过使用三十年的丹麦注册数据，我们比较了因类似犯罪而被判处不同刑罚的个体，并跟踪他们的轨迹。我们发现，监禁显著增加了前罪犯选择创业作为工资工作替代的可能性。然而，这一职业道路的代价很高：与获得常规就业的人相比，出狱后选择创业的个体收入持续较低，且更可能再次犯罪。机制分析显示，转向创业的个体主要集中在面临最严峻招聘障碍的群体中——如外籍人士、没有职业培训的人、高失业率地区的居民，以及因财产犯罪或服刑时间较长而被定罪的罪犯——这表明创业往往反映的是“推力”而非“拉力”动态。相较于失业，创业与较低的再犯率相关，但收入惩罚相似。我们的发现为创业作为边缘群体解放途径的叙述增添了细微差别，强调了依赖创业作为再融入策略的风险，并突显了需要组织和政策干预，以扩大对稳定工作的获取和为有犯罪记录的人提供针对性支持的必要性。资助：感谢卡尔斯堡基金会（Carlsbergfondet）[资助编号 CF21-0156]的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19965 获取。

title: A Prosocial Perspective on Advice Seeking and Networking: How Focusing on What Advice Givers Can Gain Motivates Advice Seekers to Reach Out More
title_cn: 一种亲社会视角下的寻求建议与建立网络：关注建议提供者所能获得的利益如何激励寻求建议者更多地主动联系

title: Listen to Your Users? Self-Selection in User Community Feedback and Commercial Impact
abstract: Firms increasingly involve user communities in product development, and prior research documents many benefits in idea generation, knowledge sharing, and cost reduction. We theorize, however, that incorporating market feedback about products from these communities can harm products’ commercial performance. Because community feedback is volunteered by self-selected participants rather than sampled to represent the broader market, it may mislead firms when narrow community preferences diverge from mainstream demand. We predict that greater incorporation of community feedback will increase positive evaluations of a product within the community, but undermine its broader commercial success when there are strong user self-selection pressures (like for initially niche-targeted games). We test this theory in the personal-computer (PC) video-game industry using Steam Early Access, where developers integrate community feedback prior to release. Using a multimethod design that combines large-scale archival analyses with interviews of developers, executives, and community members, we find that feedback incorporation during Early Access improves post-launch commercial outcomes of games only when the Early Access community closely mirrors the distribution of users in the broader Steam market. However, in unrepresentative communities—even large ones—greater incorporation predicts lower post-launch revenues despite favorable community evaluations.
title_cn: 倾听用户的声音？用户社区反馈中的自我选择及其商业影响
abstract_cn: 企业越来越多地让用户社区参与产品开发，而之前的研究记录了在创意生成、知识共享和成本降低等方面的诸多好处。然而，我们理论上认为，从这些社区获取的市场反馈可能会对产品的商业表现产生不利影响。因为社区反馈是由自我选择的参与者自愿提供的，而不是通过抽样来代表更广泛的市场，所以当狭隘的社区偏好与主流需求不一致时，可能会误导企业。我们预测，更多地采纳社区反馈将增加社区内部对产品的正面评价，但在强烈的用户自我选择压力下（例如针对最初小众市场的游戏），却会削弱其更广泛的商业成功。我们在个人电脑（PC）视频游戏产业中检验这一理论，利用Steam早期访问（Early Access）平台，在发布之前，开发者整合社区反馈。通过将大规模档案分析与开发者、高管和社区成员的访谈相结合的多重方法设计，我们发现，在早期访问期间，反馈整合只有在早期访问社区与更广泛的Steam市场用户分布紧密相似时，才能改善游戏的发布后商业结果。然而，在代表性不足的社区中——即使是大型社区——更多的反馈整合反而预测发布后收入降低，尽管社区评价仍然积极。

title: AI in science: When and where it makes a difference
abstract: Why do some scientific fields benefit far more from AI than others? To answer this question, we study the diffusion and effects of AI across more than 170 scientific fields between 2005 and 2023, drawing on a dataset of over 80 million scientific publications, and assessing its contribution to knowledge creation using indicators of novelty and impact. We find that, on average, the use of AI is associated with more novel and highly cited research, and that these effects are strengthened with recent technological advances (namely, transformers and large language models). However, these benefits are far from uniform. The contribution of AI, especially in terms of novelty, intensifies with its penetration within a field, that is, the extent to which AI is widely adopted and embedded in research practices, and with the “roughness” of the underlying knowledge space, meaning the degree to which ideas are fragmented and combinatorially complex. • AI positively contributes to scientific novelty and impact. • Effects strengthened with recent AI advances. • Effects are uneven across 170+ fields. • The contribution of AI intensifies with its penetration within a field. • Strongest gains occur in fragmented (“rough”) knowledge spaces.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 科学中的人工智能：何时何地产生影响
abstract_cn: 为什么某些科学领域比其他领域更能从人工智能中受益？为了解答这个问题，我们研究了2005年至2023年间人工智能在170多个科学领域的传播和影响，基于超过8000万篇科学出版物的数据集，并通过新颖性和影响力指标评估其对知识创造的贡献。我们发现，平均而言，人工智能的使用与更具新颖性和高引用率的研究相关，而且这些效果随着近期技术进步（即变换器和大型语言模型）的出现而增强。然而，这些好处并非均匀分布。人工智能的贡献，尤其是在新颖性方面，随着其在某一领域的渗透程度而加剧，即人工智能在研究实践中的广泛采用和嵌入程度，以及基础知识空间的“粗糙度”，即思想的碎片化和组合复杂性程度。 • 人工智能对科学新颖性和影响力有积极贡献。 • 随着近期人工智能进展，效果得到了增强。 • 170多个领域的效果不均衡。 • 人工智能的贡献随着其在某一领域的渗透程度而加剧。 • 在碎片化（“粗糙”）知识空间中，收益最为显著。

title: Bridging Knowledge Capability Gaps: Digital Technology Offsetting in Interfirm Knowledge Transfer
abstract: Abstract In this digital age, the adoption of digital technology (DT) is changing traditional business processes. Against this backdrop, we try to answer the question of whether DT could effectively bridge any interfirm knowledge capability gaps. Though effective knowledge transfer is dependent on the sender's and the receiver's knowledge capabilities, literature attributes very limited attention to their combined effects. Using signalling metaphor as the guiding framework, we forward disseminative capacity and absorptive capacity as the key capabilities of the sender and receiver, respectively, and study their combined effects on relational performance within vertical interfirm relationships. Additionally, with the belief that comprehending how DT could interplay with these capabilities holds crucial importance, we test the conjecture that DT can bridge knowledge capability gaps pertaining to the sender or the receiver. We position our hypotheses using the relational view and test them using the response surface methodology. The analysis is conducted based on a multi‐respondent dyadic survey dataset that is augmented with secondary data and longitudinal performance data. Our findings showcase that disseminative capacity and absorptive capacity are natural counterparts and that the channel effectiveness resulting from adopting DT could serve as an offsetting capability that can effectively bridge certain knowledge capability gaps.
title_cn: 弥补知识能力差距：数字技术在企业间知识转移中的补偿作用
abstract_cn: 摘要 在这个数字化时代，数字技术（DT）的采纳正在改变传统商业流程。在此背景下，我们试图回答一个问题：数字技术能否有效弥补企业间知识能力的差距。尽管有效的知识转移依赖于发送者和接收者的知识能力，但文献对此组合效应的关注非常有限。我们以信号隐喻作为指导框架，提出传播能力和吸收能力分别作为发送者和接收者的关键能力，并研究它们对纵向企业间关系中关系绩效的综合影响。此外，我们认为理解数字技术如何与这些能力相互作用至关重要，因此，我们检验了数字技术能够弥补与发送者或接收者相关的知识能力差距的假设。我们采用关系视角构建假设，并运用响应面法进行检验。分析基于一个多回应者的双向调查数据集，辅以次级数据和纵向绩效数据。我们的研究结果表明，传播能力和吸收能力是自然的对应关系，采用数字技术所带来的通道效能可以作为一种补偿能力，有效弥补某些知识能力的差距。

title: Competitive Dynamics are Alive with the Sound of Music: A Reply to “Time to Face the Music”
title_cn: 竞争动态与音乐的旋律共生：对“是时候面对音乐了”的回应

title_cn: 声音另一侧的领导者：扩展Black等人的集体声音综合理论

title_cn: 当福利适得其反：社会保险缴费对产品质量合规性的影响

title: Understanding Employees’ Moral Behaviors in Response to Corporate Social Irresponsibility (CSI): A Co-creational Perspective
title_cn: 理解员工对企业社会不负责任行为（CSI）的道德反应：一种共创视角

title: Speaking Across Silences: Academic Freedom, Care, and Responsibility
title_cn: 跨越沉默的对话：学术自由、关怀与责任

title: Speaking Across Silences: The Structural and Material Intersections of Business, Violence, and Ethical Responsibility
abstract: Abstract This curated essay collection examines the structural and material intersections between business, violence, and ethical responsibility. Bringing together diverse perspectives, the essays collated here challenge the tendency within business ethics to treat violence as external to economic activity or as a purely political phenomenon. Instead, the contributions reveal how firms, markets, and organizational practices are deeply entangled in systems of structural violence. The essays address corporate reporting and infrastructural injustice in water governance, the political economy of conflict and resource extraction in Africa, the ethical dimensions of food-related violence, from starvation to food waste, and the moral responsibilities of business ethics scholars confronting violence within postcolonial contexts. This essay collection is an intervention; it calls for an expansion of business ethics scholarship to confront silences surrounding structural and material violence and to engage more directly with questions of power, complicity, and ethical responsibility in contemporary global systems marked by severe injustices.
title_cn: 跨越沉默的对话：商业、暴力与伦理责任的结构与物质交叉
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文集探讨了商业、暴力与伦理责任之间的结构性和物质性交汇。通过汇集多元视角，这些论文挑战了商业伦理中将暴力视为经济活动之外或纯粹政治现象的倾向。相反，贡献者揭示了公司、市场和组织实践如何深深纠缠于结构性暴力的系统中。这些论文涉及企业报告和水治理中的基础设施不公、非洲冲突与资源开采的政治经济学、与食物相关的暴力的伦理维度，从饥饿到食物浪费，以及商业伦理学者在后殖民背景下面对暴力时的道德责任。本文集是一种干预；它呼吁扩展商业伦理研究，以应对围绕结构性和物质性暴力的沉默，并更直接地参与当代全球系统中权力、共谋和伦理责任的问题，这些系统以严重的不公正为特征。

title: Tax avoidance and ESG disclosure mandates: international evidence
abstract: Abstract This paper examines how regulations mandating environmental, social, and governance (ESG) disclosure affect corporate tax behavior. Using a difference-in-differences analysis on a sample of firms from 48 countries, we find that ESG disclosure mandates lead to significant reductions in tax avoidance, with stronger effects for mandates that include tax-relevant provisions. We identify increases in ESG information transparency and improvements in firms’ ESG performance as channels through which ESG disclosure mandates reduce tax avoidance. We further find that the decrease in tax avoidance following ESG disclosure mandates is more pronounced in countries with weaker financial disclosure requirements, legal and tax enforcement, and environmental and social institutions. Collectively, the evidence suggests that non-financial disclosure regulations can curb aggressive tax behavior, supporting broader goals of corporate accountability and sustainable development.
title_cn: 避税与ESG信息披露要求：国际证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文研究了强制环境、社会和治理（ESG）信息披露的法规如何影响企业的税收行为。通过对来自48个国家的公司样本进行差异中的差异分析，我们发现ESG信息披露的强制要求显著减少了税务规避，其中包括与税务相关条款的强制要求产生的影响更为显著。我们识别出ESG信息透明度的提升和公司ESG表现的改善是ESG信息披露强制要求减少税务规避的渠道。此外，我们还发现，在财务信息披露要求较弱、法律和税务执法力度不足以及环境与社会机构不健全的国家，ESG信息披露强制要求后税务规避的减少现象更为明显。总体而言，证据表明，非财务信息披露法规可以遏制激进的税务行为，支持企业问责和可持续发展的更广泛目标。

title: Silent struggle: How older employees’ relational age and voice behavior shape co-worker trust and performance in professional teams
abstract: How do older employees maintain trust and demonstrate value in age-diverse teams where seniority does not confer authority? In flat-structured teams where members hold similar titles, younger employees may question why older colleagues have not advanced, creating status incongruence and lowering trust in their ability. Drawing on status characteristics theory, we argue that older employees’ relational age (i.e. the average age difference from their younger peers) can be negatively associated with co-worker trust and task performance. We further propose that older employees’ voice behavior mitigates the negative effects of relational age. In Study 1, using a round-robin survey design with 199 employees across 56 Taiwanese teams, we find that voice moderates the negative relationship between relational age and co-worker trust, as well as the indirect effect on supervisor-rated performance. In Study 2, a vignette experiment with 177 Australian participants, relational age reduced trust via lower perceived competence (but not warmth), and this effect was eliminated when the older worker displayed voice. Our research shows how age-based status beliefs can be challenged in professional teams, contributing to scholarship on workplace stereotyping, intragroup status hierarchies, and proactive strategies in age-diverse teams, while offering practical guidance for sustaining older employees’ careers.
title_cn: 无声的斗争：年长员工的关系年龄与发声行为如何影响专业团队中的同事信任与表现
abstract_cn: 在缺乏权威的情况下，老年员工如何在年龄多样化的团队中维护信任并展示价值？在扁平结构的团队中，成员职称相似，年轻员工可能会质疑老年同事为何没有晋升，从而产生地位不一致感并降低对他们能力的信任。基于地位特征理论，我们认为老年员工的关系年龄（即与年轻同事的平均年龄差）可能与同事信任和任务表现呈负相关。此外，我们进一步提出，老年员工的发声行为能够减轻关系年龄的负面影响。在研究1中，我们使用了包含199名员工的56个台湾团队的轮次调查设计，发现发声行为在关系年龄与同事信任之间的负向关系以及对主管评价表现的间接效应中起到了调节作用。在研究2中，我们进行了一项包含177名澳大利亚参与者的情境实验，结果显示关系年龄通过降低感知能力（而不是温暖感）来减少信任，而当老年员工表现出发声时，这一效应被消除。我们的研究展示了如何在专业团队中挑战基于年龄的地位信念，为职场刻板印象、组内地位等级以及在年龄多样化团队中的主动策略提供了学术贡献，同时为支持老年员工的职业发展提供了实用指导。

title: How to not change the world: Actionism and pseudo-praxis in organization and management theory
abstract: Critical research is facing calls for practical relevance through academic activism, affirmation of alternatives, collaboration with practitioners and critical performativity, with earlier traditions of critique dismissed as being negative, detached, and ineffective. This paper challenges this framing by returning to debates within Frankfurt School critical theory, particularly Theodor Adorno’s analysis of ‘thinking actionism’ – that is, a form of self-defeating critique based on a prioritization of practice, naïve optimism, faith in collectivity, and academic self-aggrandizement. Using this theoretical lens, we problematize trends within recent practice-oriented and impact-focused critical scholarship and offer three provocations. First, we caution against equating critique with practice and impact and dismissing critical theory. Second, we highlight the indirect and often unintended influence of critical theory on practice and revisit Frankfurt School approaches – such as immanent critique and negative dialectics – as theoretical resources that advance the relation between theory and practice. Finally, we evaluate examples of intellectual engagements that illustrate the potential for this more dialectical approach to politics and organizing.
title_cn: 如何不改变世界：组织与管理理论中的行动主义与伪实践
abstract_cn: 批判性研究面临着通过学术行动主义、确认替代方案、与从业者的合作以及批判性表现力等方式实现实际相关性的呼声，早期的批判传统则被视为负面、脱离现实和无效的。这篇论文通过回归法兰克福学派批判理论中的辩论，特别是西奥多·阿多诺对“思考行动主义”的分析，挑战了这种框架——即一种基于对实践的优先考虑、幼稚的乐观、对集体的信任以及学术自我膨胀的自我打击型批判形式。借助这一理论视角，我们对最近以实践为导向和关注影响的批判学术趋势进行问题化，并提出三项反思。首先，我们提醒不要将批判与实践和影响等同，亦不要轻视批判理论。其次，我们强调批判理论对实践的间接且常常是意想不到的影响，并重新审视法兰克福学派的方法——如内在批判和否定辩证法——作为推进理论与实践关系的理论资源。最后，我们评估一些智力参与的例子，这些例子展示了更辩证的政治和组织方法的潜力。
